basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR NIPB) Young Professional-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://nipb.icar.gov.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR NIPB Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per ICAR guidelines

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduates/B Tech in Botany/Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/Agricultural Biotechnology
qualification.details: Post Graduates/B Tech in Botany/Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/Agricultural Biotechnology. Desirable: Two Years of experience in plant transformation, sound knowledge of designing construct for gene editing and molecular characterization of transgenic plants.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to email the application for the ICAR NIPB Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to email your application with Biodata is 12 May 2026. Ensure you submit it well before this deadline to be considered for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II post is scheduled to be held on 14 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduate degree or B.Tech in Botany, Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, or Agricultural Biotechnology. Experience in plant transformation is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Young Professional-II post is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICAR guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-II position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ICAR NIPB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the General/OBC categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any other category-specific fee details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The project duration for the Young Professional-II position is up to 30 September 2026. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional-II post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology located?
faq.answer: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012. The exact venue for the walk-in interview will be mentioned in the official notification.
